title: calystegia collina
intro: Calystegia collina, also known as the coastal false bindweed, is a perennial vine native to the Mediterranean region and parts of the United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Calystegia collina include reducing anxiety and stress, relieving menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
